_note: Curated seed sample of representative postings compiled for Sage's demo — NOT scraped live. requirement_excerpts are trimmed to the requirement lines only; source_url points to a placeholder seed host. Within each role_type the core requirements deliberately recur so the readiness aggregation has real signal.

postings.title: Machine Learning Engineer, Applied AI
requirement_excerpts: Strong Python and hands-on experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow
Deploy and serve models in production, owning latency, throughput and reliability
Experience building on large language models: RAG, prompting, and evaluation of LLM outputs
Set up experiment tracking, offline/online evaluation, and CI/CD for model releases
Comfortable reading recent ML literature and turning it into shipped features

postings.title: New Grad Machine Learning Engineer
requirement_excerpts: Proficiency in Python; familiarity with a deep learning framework such as PyTorch
Take models from notebook to production endpoints with monitoring and rollback
Build and operate large-scale data and training pipelines
Instrument model quality metrics and automated evaluation before rollout
BS/MS in CS or related field; internship experience with real ML systems preferred

postings.title: AI Engineer, LLM Products
requirement_excerpts: Ship features powered by LLMs: retrieval-augmented generation, tool use, prompt engineering
Python required; experience with model-serving frameworks a plus
Deploy inference services to production and keep p95 latency within budget
Design evaluation harnesses that measure hallucination, groundedness and regressions
Own a feature end to end from prototype to production traffic

postings.title: Machine Learning Engineer I
requirement_excerpts: Python and PyTorch or TensorFlow for model development
Build distributed data and feature pipelines that feed training at scale
Serve models in production and set up model monitoring for drift and degradation
Partner with platform teams on CI/CD and reproducible training runs
New grads welcome; demonstrated ML project or internship experience expected

postings.title: Applied Scientist, New Grad
requirement_excerpts: Strong Python; experience training models with PyTorch or JAX
Work with large-scale distributed training and data-processing pipelines
Translate research prototypes into production-grade services
Experience fine-tuning or prompting large language models is a plus
Rigorous about experiment design and offline evaluation

postings.title: ML Platform Engineer, Early Career
requirement_excerpts: Python and solid software-engineering fundamentals
Build the tooling that deploys and serves models reliably in production
Own model CI/CD, experiment tracking and automated evaluation gates
Operate large-scale batch and streaming data pipelines for features
Care about observability: metrics, logging and alerting for ML services

postings.title: Software Engineer, Backend
requirement_excerpts: Solid CS fundamentals and proficiency in one of Go, Java, or Python
Design and build scalable REST and gRPC APIs
Model data in relational databases and write and optimize SQL queries
Work with Docker, Kubernetes and a major cloud provider (AWS or GCP)
Contribute to microservices in a distributed, high-throughput system

postings.title: Junior Backend Engineer
requirement_excerpts: 1+ years or strong internship experience in Java, Go, or Python
Build and maintain production REST APIs used by web and mobile clients
Design database schemas and tune SQL for performance
Deploy services with Docker and Kubernetes on AWS
Own reliability: monitoring, alerting and on-call for your services

postings.title: New Grad Software Engineer, Platform
requirement_excerpts: BS in CS or equivalent; strong data structures and algorithms
Build distributed microservices that scale to high request volumes
Containerize and deploy services on Kubernetes in the cloud
Instrument services with metrics, tracing and structured logging
Expose clean, versioned APIs for internal and external consumers

postings.title: Backend Developer I
requirement_excerpts: Proficiency in a backend language such as Python, Go or Java
Design and ship REST APIs backing high-traffic product features
Strong SQL and experience with relational database design
Work within a microservices architecture and understand its trade-offs
Deploy with containers to a cloud environment

postings.title: Software Engineer, Services
requirement_excerpts: Strong programming fundamentals in Go, Java or C++
Build and operate distributed backend services at scale
Design relational and key-value data models; write efficient SQL
Own service reliability including on-call, SLOs and incident response
Design and evolve internal APIs between services

postings.title: Early Career Backend Engineer
requirement_excerpts: Internship or 1+ years with Python, Java or Go
Build secure, well-tested REST APIs for regulated data
Deploy to Kubernetes on AWS or GCP
Work in a distributed microservices environment
Add monitoring and alerting so issues are caught before users notice

postings.title: Data Engineer I
requirement_excerpts: Build and maintain batch ETL/ELT pipelines that power analytics
Strong SQL and hands-on experience with a cloud data warehouse (Snowflake, BigQuery or Redshift)
Process large datasets with Apache Spark
Orchestrate workflows with Airflow or a similar scheduler
Python for pipeline code and data tooling

postings.title: Junior Data Engineer
requirement_excerpts: Develop ELT pipelines that load raw data into the warehouse
Advanced SQL against Snowflake or BigQuery
Author and schedule DAGs in Airflow
Data modeling for analytics and dashboards, with tests for data quality
Python and version control in a collaborative codebase

postings.title: New Grad Data Engineer
requirement_excerpts: Build reliable ETL pipelines feeding downstream analytics and ML
Strong SQL; experience with a cloud data warehouse
Distributed data processing with Spark
Design dimensional data models and enforce data quality checks
BS in CS or related; internship with real data pipelines preferred

postings.title: Analytics Data Engineer
requirement_excerpts: Own ELT pipelines from source systems into the warehouse
Expert SQL and modeling in BigQuery or Snowflake
Orchestrate transformations with Airflow or dbt
Build data-quality tests and monitoring for pipeline freshness
Partner with analysts to model clean, trustworthy datasets

postings.title: Data Platform Engineer, Early Career
requirement_excerpts: Build and operate ingestion pipelines for batch and streaming data
Process data at scale with Spark
Work with streaming systems such as Kafka or Kinesis
Orchestrate jobs with Airflow and monitor pipeline health
Python and solid software-engineering practices

postings.title: Data Engineer, Pipelines
requirement_excerpts: Design ETL/ELT pipelines that move data reliably at scale
Strong SQL and experience with a columnar data warehouse
Large-scale processing with Spark
Ingest real-time event streams via Kafka
Python for data infrastructure and automation
